title: schiedea implexa
intro: Schiedea implexa, also known as Hawaiian violet, is a rare and endemic flowering plant found only in Hawaii, USA. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Schiedea implexa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
